info.title: Matomo Analytics Reporting API
info.description: Matomo (formerly Piwik) Analytics Reporting API. Provides programmatic access to all analytics reports including visits, page views, referrers, goals, events, e-commerce, and more. Uses a single endpoint with module and method query parameters. Supports JSON, XML, CSV, TSV, HTML, and RSS output formats.

get.description: Main Matomo Reporting API endpoint. Use the 'method' parameter to specify which API method to call. All reporting, management, and administration methods are available through this single endpoint.

parameters.name: module
parameters.description: Always set to 'API'

parameters.name: method
parameters.description: API method to call (e.g. VisitsSummary.get, Actions.getPageUrls)

parameters.name: idSite
parameters.description: Site ID (integer or comma-separated list, or 'all')

parameters.name: period
parameters.description: Period: day, week, month, year, or range

parameters.name: date
parameters.description: Date in YYYY-MM-DD, or magic keywords: today, yesterday, lastX, previousX, or range YYYY-MM-DD,YYYY-MM-DD

parameters.name: format
parameters.description: Output format

parameters.name: segment
parameters.description: Segment filter expression

parameters.name: filter_limit
parameters.description: Max rows to return (-1 for all)

parameters.name: filter_offset
parameters.description: Starting row offset

parameters.name: filter_sort_column
parameters.description: Column to sort by

parameters.name: filter_sort_order
parameters.description: Sort order

parameters.name: expanded
parameters.description: Include subtables (1=yes)

parameters.name: flat
parameters.description: Flatten hierarchical data (1=yes)

parameters.name: language
parameters.description: 2-letter language code for translations

parameters.name: hideColumns
parameters.description: Comma-separated columns to hide

parameters.name: showColumns
parameters.description: Comma-separated columns to show

parameters.name: label
parameters.description: Filter to row with matching label

parameters.name: format_metrics
parameters.description: Format metrics (0=raw, 1=formatted)

parameters.name: columns
parameters.description: Columns to return (comma-separated)

parameters.name: idGoal
parameters.description: Goal ID for goal-specific reports

parameters.name: idDimension
parameters.description: Custom dimension ID

parameters.name: idSubtable
parameters.description: Subtable ID for drill-down

parameters.name: showMetadata
parameters.description: Include metadata (0=no, 1=yes)

parameters.name: pivotBy
parameters.description: Dimension ID to pivot by

parameters.name: pivotByColumn
parameters.description: Column to display in pivot

200.description: API response (format depends on method and format parameter)

post.description: POST version of the Reporting API. Recommended for requests with token_auth for security, and required for bulk requests. Parameters can be in the request body.

get.description: Retrieve overall visit summary metrics for a site. Equivalent to calling /index.php?module=API&method=VisitsSummary.get

parameters.name: idSite
parameters.description: Site ID (integer or comma-separated list, or 'all')

parameters.name: period
parameters.description: Period: day, week, month, year, or range

parameters.name: date
parameters.description: Date in YYYY-MM-DD, or magic keywords: today, yesterday, lastX, previousX, or range YYYY-MM-DD,YYYY-MM-DD

parameters.name: format
parameters.description: Output format
